summary: iter224 ECW Ops testing complete. 21/21 backend tests passed. Mobile /m/ecw 4-tab shell working with all tabs (Waste, Line Check, Recipes, Photos). Line Check shows 5 stations with EchoAi par suggestions. Desktop ECW Waste panel loads correctly (regression pass). /m/waste regression pass.

integration_issues.issue: Panel click in sidebar doesn't open the panel - may be a panel host issue or lazy loading delay
integration_issues.note: Panel is registered in panel-registry.ts and sidebar entry exists. Backend APIs all working. Mobile /m/ecw works perfectly.

action_items: Investigate why desktop ECW Menu Builder panel doesn't open when clicked in sidebar (low priority - mobile /m/ecw works)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed syntax error in /app/client/modules/IRD/IRDHubPanel.tsx line 42 (duplicate code on same line)

success_rate.frontend: 95% (mobile ECW Ops fully working, desktop panel click issue)

test_credentials: X-User-Id: chef-william for outlet-scoped endpoints. devAuth=1 bypass for frontend.
seed_data_creation: Used existing seed data: 5 stations, 17 items, 21 components, 5 recipes, 2 outlets (main + beachside), chef-william access
context_for_next_testing_agent: iter224 ECW Ops features tested. Backend: All 14 ECW Ops endpoints working (stations, items, components, recipes, outlets/mine, summary, published, par-suggest, line-check/start/record/complete, photos, publish, outlets/switch). Line Check flow with temp excursion flagging works. Par suggestions include all 6 drivers (sales, occupancy, reservations, weather, dow, events). Recipe SMS queues when Twilio creds missing. Photo upload with auto-name works. Menu publish increments version. Averaged-trust benchmark endpoint works. Frontend: Mobile /m/ecw has 4 tabs working (Waste, Line Check, Recipes, Photos). Line Check shows 5 stations with EchoAi par suggestions per item. Outlet switcher shows 'Main Kitchen'. Desktop ECW Waste panel loads (regression pass). /m/waste regression pass.
